description: Database connection pool exhaustion causing 503 errors across all services
root_cause: Connection leak in auth-service v2.3.0 under high concurrent load
resolution: Deployed hotfix v2.3.1 with connection pool timeout and proper cleanup
lessons_learned: Added connection pool monitoring metrics and set alert at 80% utilization threshold

description: Authentication service outage lasting 5 minutes during peak hours
root_cause: Misconfigured health check timeout after infrastructure update
resolution: Corrected health check configuration and added pre-deployment validation
lessons_learned: Implemented health check configuration as code with automated testing

description: Payment processing timeout affecting 12% of transactions for 7 minutes
root_cause: Upstream payment gateway rate limiting due to retry storm
resolution: Implemented circuit breaker pattern and exponential backoff for payment calls
lessons_learned: Added circuit breaker to all external service integrations and documented retry policies

description: DDoS attack causing elevated latency for 4 minutes before WAF mitigated
resolution: WAF rate limiting rules auto-triggered and blocked malicious traffic
lessons_learned: Enhanced WAF rules with geographic blocking and challenge pages for suspicious patterns

description: Data pipeline stall causing 22-minute delay in real-time reporting
root_cause: Kafka consumer group rebalance triggered by node failure during deployment
resolution: Restarted consumer group with manual partition assignment
lessons_learned: Implemented graceful shutdown hooks and rolling deployment for Kafka consumers

description: SSL certificate mismatch on production load balancer causing browser warnings
root_cause: Certificate renewal automation failed silently due to DNS validation issue
resolution: Manually renewed certificate and fixed DNS validation configuration
lessons_learned: Added certificate expiry monitoring with 30-day warning and automated renewal verification

description: Production database approaching storage limit causing write failures
root_cause: Unmonitored table growth from audit log retention exceeding 2-year policy
resolution: Emergency storage expansion and implemented log rotation with 90-day hot storage
lessons_learned: Added storage growth trending alerts and automated archival to cold storage

description: Customer data export job failure with no automatic retry
root_cause: Export job exceeded Lambda 15-minute timeout for large customer datasets
resolution: Migrated export to Step Functions with chunked processing
lessons_learned: Redesigned long-running jobs to use Step Functions with checkpointing and resume capability
